message:
perf(pager/btree): add page cache metrics, fix ARC latency spikes, rewrite balance_deeper

Page cache (PageCache):
- Add comprehensive hit/miss/admit/eviction counters with
  PageCacheMetricsSnapshot API for observability and cache tuning.
- Expose metrics_snapshot() and reset_metrics() on both PageCache
  and SimplePager.

ARC cache performance:
- Remove opportunistic version coalescing on the hot admit path that
  caused O(N) latency spikes. Superseded versions are now reclaimed
  asynchronously by the GC thread or lazily by evict_one_preferred.
- Bound find_superseded_victim scans to 64 entries to ensure O(1)
  worst-case eviction decisions.
- Rewrite coalesce_one_superseded_for_replace to directly evict a
  single superseded victim instead of iterating all multi-version pages.
- Rewrite coalesce_all_versions to use a single-pass collection over
  T1+T2 instead of per-page scanning, reducing GC sweep cost.

B-tree balance_deeper:
- Rewrite root-to-child page copy to extract cells first, then rebuild
  the child page using build_page(). The previous approach had an
  offset-shifting bug when the root page is page 1 (100-byte header
  offset) that corrupted cell pointers during the copy.

Pager:
- Prevent duplicate entries in freed_pages list during transaction
  page deallocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
